ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gift_baskets" (
  "gift_basket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gift basket */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the gift basket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gift basket */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the gift basket */,
  "image_link" TEXT /* Link to the image of the gift basket */,
  "price" TEXT /* The cost of the gift basket if it is for sale */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* The number of gift baskets available for redemption */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the gift basket (e.g., active, inactive, out of stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gift_basket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gift_basket_contents" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content item */,
  "gift_basket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gift basket the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the gift basket */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item for easier reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_basket_contents_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_basket_contents_gift_basket_id FOREIGN KEY ("gift_basket_id") REFERENCES gift_baskets ("gift_basket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., in-game currency, booster, exclusive content) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity level of the item (e.g., common, rare, epic) */,
  "value" TEXT /* In-game value or points of the item */,
  "image_link" TEXT /* Link to the image of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, administrator) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* The date the user registered on the platform */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the reward in days */,
  "value" TEXT /* In-game value or points of the reward */,
  "image_link" TEXT /* Link to the image of the reward */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the reward (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_rewards" (
  "user_reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user reward */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the reward */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward */,
  "earned_date" TEXT /* Date the reward was earned */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the reward expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the user reward (e.g., active, used, expired) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity of the reward earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rewards_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rewards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gift_basket_rewards" (
  "gift_basket_reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gift basket reward */,
  "gift_basket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gift basket */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the reward in days */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reward */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the gift basket reward (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gift_basket_reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_basket_rewards_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_basket_rewards_gift_basket_id FOREIGN KEY ("gift_basket_id") REFERENCES gift_baskets ("gift_basket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "redemption_codes" (
  "redemption_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each redemption code */,
  "gift_basket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gift basket */,
  "code" TEXT /* Redemption code */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the redemption code */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the redemption code (e.g., unused, used, expired) */,
  "redeemed_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who redeemed the code (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("redemption_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_redemption_codes_gift_basket_id FOREIGN KEY ("gift_basket_id") REFERENCES gift_baskets ("gift_basket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_redemption_codes_redeemed_by FOREIGN KEY ("redeemed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gift_basket_redemptions" (
  "gift_basket_redemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gift basket redemption */,
  "gift_basket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gift basket */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who redeemed the gift basket */,
  "redemption_date" TEXT /* Date the gift basket was redeemed */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the gift basket redemption (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* A unique identifier for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gift_basket_redemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_basket_redemptions_gift_basket_id FOREIGN KEY ("gift_basket_id") REFERENCES gift_baskets ("gift_basket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_basket_redemptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
